relationships.context: V uses N5 OS as a cognitive operating system
V uses Incantum for natural language commands
V uses Function Files for orchestrating workflows
V uses Scripts as reusable behaviors
V believes in the concept of Single Source of Truth
V believes in the SPO Triple knowledge structure
V believes in avoiding Single Point of Failure
V uses Breadcrumb System for tracking
V uses Direct Processing for LLM-based ingestion
V uses Lists for tracking ideas and contacts
V uses Knowledge Reservoirs for storing information
V adheres to the Rule-of-Two principle
V uses Rosetta Stone for self-describing data
